# AL Mughal Constructions

> AL-MUGHAL CONSTRUCTIONS LTD — Domestic & Commercial Property Experts in Bradford, West Yorkshire, UK.

## About

AL Mughal Constructions is a trusted construction company based in Bradford, West Yorkshire. We specialise in residential and commercial building services including house extensions, loft conversions, new builds, renovations, roofing, brickwork, driveways, landscaping, and structural repairs. ECO grants are available — claim your free ECO grants quote today.

## Services

- New House Construction
- House Extensions
- Loft Conversions
- Property Renovations
- Bathroom Renovations
- Kitchen Renovations
- Roofing Services
- Brickwork & Masonry
- Driveways & Paving
- Landscaping & Gardens
- Commercial Construction
- Structural Repairs

## Service Area

Bradford, West Yorkshire, and surrounding areas in the UK.

## Key Facts

- Fully insured construction company
- Free quotes and site visits
- Domestic and commercial property experts
- ECO grants available for eligible projects
- Local Bradford builders with Yorkshire expertise
